title: Godfather Death
lines: A poor man with many children asked God to be the godfather of his youngest son.
God appeared and said he would teach the boy to be a great physician.
When the boy came of age, God revealed the secret: if he saw Death standing at the head of a bed, the patient would die; at the foot, the patient would live.
The young physician became famous and rich by using this knowledge.
But one day, the king called upon him to cure his daughter.
When he saw Death standing at her head, he knew she would die.
Moved by her beauty and the king's offer of gold, he turned the girl around so that Death stood at her feet.
He cured her and married her.
But God was angered by his deception.
Death appeared and led the physician to a cavern where candles burned, each representing a human life.
The physician's candle was nearly spent.
As it flickered and died, so did he.
